reviews.comment:
Buena atención baños limpios .me llamó la atención que pase a las 5 de la mañana y estaban los baños cerrados todo cerrado

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean bathrooms. It caught my attention that I went at 5 in the morning and the bathrooms were closed, everything was closed.

reviews.comment:
Mala atención en la caja, la señorita que atiende muy mal, me gustaría hacer una queja a través del libro de quejas ya que fue bastante mala su atención, tuve desistir de la compra, una verdadera vergüenza!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service at the checkout. The young woman who served me was very rude. I would like to file a complaint through the complaints book because her service was so poor that I had to cancel the purchase. A real disgrace!
